steps.title: Enter the two points
steps.content: The line contains $(0,0)$ and $(1,40)$. In Desmos, enter $x_1=[0,1]$ and $y_1=[0,40]$, then type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$.

steps.title: Read the model
steps.content: Desmos gives $m=40$ and $b=0$, so the equation is $$h(x)=40x.$$ By hand, the slope is $\dfrac{40-0}{1-0}=40$, and the intercept is $0$ because the line passes through the origin.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choices A, B, and C all give $h(0)=40$, so they fail the point $(0,0)$.
